title: Seven Steps to Zero
style: dark sci-fi noir, deep blues and electric greens, volumetric GPU-interior lighting, hard geometric shadows, cyberpunk aesthetic

characters.name: The Archivist
characters.description: tall androgynous figure in a silver compression suit with circuit-trace tattoos glowing amber, close-cropped white hair, intense analytical eyes like oscilloscope green, carrying a worn leather ledger with nibble-sized pages

characters.name: The Runner
characters.description: a compact figure in a black warp-lane jacket numbered 32, dark braided hair with glowing half-precision highlights, perpetually in motion, worn boots trailing spark trails, expression of urgent focus

scenes.image_prompt: vast cathedral of floating-point data towers stretching to infinity, amber columns of numbers cascading like rainfall, single figure standing before an enormous glowing matrix wall, low camera angle emphasizing scale
scenes.video_prompt: slow pan upward along data columns, The Archivist raises one hand and columns begin freezing into crystalline blocks, dust of discarded precision floats away like ash
scenes.narration: Every weight carries more truth than it needs. My job is to find what remains when you strip away the noise.

scenes.image_prompt: intimate workshop space inside a warp tile, two glowing INT4 crystals being pressed together into a single byte-capsule on a steel workbench, green sparks, walls lined with scale-factor vials labeled in FP16
scenes.video_prompt: The Archivist carefully presses two crystalline shards together, they fuse with a snap of light, place the packed capsule into a row of identical ones, the shelf fills rhythmically
scenes.narration: Low nibble. High nibble. Two lives packed into one byte. The scale remembers what the number forgot.

scenes.image_prompt: thunderous arena of parallel computation, 32 identical lanes of light stretching into darkness, figure sprinting down one lane carrying a uint4 fragment, synchronized figures in adjacent lanes visible as motion blur
scenes.video_prompt: low tracking shot following The Runner at full speed, all 32 lanes fire simultaneously, MMA instruction emitted as a shockwave ripple across the arena floor
scenes.narration: We are thirty-two. We are one warp. The matrix multiply begins the moment we agree.

scenes.image_prompt: shared memory antechamber glowing cool blue, rows of scale-factor tablets arranged in perfect grids on luminous shelves, figure pausing mid-sprint to read a tablet, accumulator registers burning gold in cupped hands
scenes.video_prompt: The Runner skids to a halt, grabs a scale tablet, multiplies it against the burning accumulator in their hands — the gold intensifies, they sprint onward without breaking rhythm
scenes.narration: Without the scale you have integers. With it, you have meaning. Half precision. Enough.

scenes.image_prompt: output plane stretching to the horizon, a completed half-precision matrix shimmering like a frozen lake, figure kneeling at the edge examining the surface, reflection shows original full-precision ghost superimposed beneath
scenes.video_prompt: slow dolly forward toward The Archivist kneeling at the matrix edge, they press one hand to the surface, cosine ripple radiates outward confirming 0.98 similarity, they close the leather ledger
scenes.narration: Close enough to the truth that it passes. Far enough compressed that it flies. That is all a quantizer can ask.
